author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: index_select_f32/f64, strided_split_f32/f64, strided_copy_f32/f64, strided_cat_f32/f64, strided_scatter_f32/f64, slice_read_f32/f64, slice_write_f32/f64, permute_f32/f64, repeat_along_dim_f32/f64, scatter_add_f32/f64, scatter_add_rows_f32/f64. All are stride-aware gather/scatter patterns; single thread per output element.
